utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: After applying the Waxine and linen strips to leg number one ,

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Grasp one of the linen strips by its easy grab tab and pull it off in one quick pain free motion .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No . It was painful . Oh my God , they should call it Pain ... zine , now with a little wax .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Huh , well , the girls in the satin nighties on the commercial do not seem to think it is that bad .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That is because their nerves are probably deadened from being so stupid .

emotion_cause.span: 7_the girls in the satin nighties on the commercial do not seem to think it is that bad .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: But hey , you know if you do not believe me , please , by my guest .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ow ... ow ... ow ... ow ! Oh my God ! ! !
